usage: 右側學習面板：字幕、單字、AI 對話、救命句。HTML 目前內建 fallback；此檔可供後續改為外部讀取。

dialogue: Hi. I didn’t expect to see you here.
Yeah… what a coincidence.
items.rescue: I’m not ignoring you. I just need a second.
